title: 「If only」句型
titleZh: 「If only 句」表達願望、遺憾或強烈希望
titleEn: Using If only to express wishes, regrets and strong hopes

source.file: Sentence Structure 62 -「If only 句」表達願望、遺憾或強烈希望.pdf
omissions: English versions of Chinese-only Important Rules and Benefits explanations are faithful editorial translations.

formula: If only + subject + past form + other information

formulas.labelEn: A wish or regret about the present
formulas.labelZh: 對現在情況的願望或遺憾
formulas.formula: If only + subject + past simple / were + other information
If only + subject + had + past participle + other information

formulas.labelEn: A hoped-for change in ability or circumstances
formulas.labelZh: 希望能力、可能性或情況有所改變
formulas.formula: If only + subject + could / would + base verb + other information

example: If only I had more time.
exampleZh: 要是我有更多時間就好了。

examples.en: If only I had more time.
examples.zh: 要是我有更多時間就好了。

examples.en: If only I had left earlier.
examples.zh: 要是我當時早一點離開就好了。

meaning.zh: If only 用來表達強烈願望、對現況的不滿或對過去事情的遺憾，通常暗示現實與願望不同。

rules.en: Use the past tense for a present situation that is contrary to fact.
rules.zh: 表達與現在事實相反的願望時使用過去式；這個過去形式並不是指過去。
examples: If only I had more time.

rules.en: Use had + past participle to express regret about the past.
rules.zh: 對已經發生、現在無法改變的事情感到後悔時，使用 had + 過去分詞。
examples: If only we had booked earlier.

rules.en: Use could for an ability or possibility.
rules.zh: Could 用來表示希望擁有某種能力或可能性。
examples: If only I could remember her name.

rules.en: Would often expresses a wish for another person, thing or situation to change. Normally avoid If only I would for an action you can control.
rules.zh: Would 常表示希望某人、某事或某種情況改變；一般不要使用 If only I would... 表達自己有能力控制的行動。
examples: If only the rain would stop.

rules.en: This exercise uses were for wishes contrary to present fact.
rules.zh: 口語中有時會聽到 was，但在正式及標準英文中，假設性的願望通常使用 were；本練習統一使用 were。
examples: If only the room were warmer.

rules.en: If only expresses a wish or regret; only if introduces a necessary condition.
rules.zh: If only 表達願望、遺憾或「只可惜」；only if 表達必要條件，意思是「只有在……的情況下才……」。
examples: If only I had enough money.
You may enter only if your name is on the list.

benefits.en: It clearly shows that reality differs from the speaker’s wish.
benefits.zh: 讀者一看到 if only，便知道說話者希望事情不是現在這個樣子，或後悔過去沒有採取另一個做法。

benefits.en: It makes wishes and regrets more emphatic.
benefits.zh: If only 通常比普通的 I wish 更能表達強烈感受，適合用於日常對話、故事和個人寫作。

benefits.en: It places the regret directly in the sentence’s main focus.
benefits.zh: 你可以用 If only... 開始句子，讓讀者立即知道你最在意或最希望改變的是甚麼。

benefits.en: It helps distinguish a present regret from a past regret.
benefits.zh: 過去式表示現在不符合願望；had + 過去分詞則表示對已經發生的事情感到後悔。

benefits.en: It avoids repeatedly using I wish or It is a pity that.
benefits.zh: 這個句型可避免反覆使用 I wish 或 It is a pity that，並更直接地表達說話者的遺憾。

sourceOmissions: English versions of Chinese-only Important Rules and Benefits explanations are faithful editorial translations.

en: Rewrite each sentence using if only to express the same wish or regret.
The first word of each answer has been provided.
zh: 使用 if only 改寫以下句子，表達相同的願望或遺憾。
每題已提供答案的第一個字。

questions.prompt: I wish I had more time to finish the book.
questions.promptZh: 我希望自己有更多時間看完這本書。
questions.answer: If only I had more time to finish the book.
questions.answerZh: 要是我有更多時間看完這本書就好了。
questions.highlight: If only I had more time to finish the book.

questions.prompt: Mia wishes she lived closer to school.
questions.promptZh: 米婭希望自己住得離學校近一點。
questions.answer: If only Mia lived closer to school.
questions.answerZh: 要是米婭住得離學校近一點就好了。
questions.highlight: If only Mia lived closer to school.

questions.prompt: It is a pity that the room is not warmer.
questions.promptZh: 只可惜房間不夠暖。
questions.answer: If only the room were warmer.
questions.answerZh: 要是房間暖一點就好了。
questions.highlight: If only the room were warmer.

questions.prompt: What does Ben wish? He wishes he knew the answer.
questions.promptZh: 本有甚麼願望？他希望自己知道答案。
questions.answer: If only Ben knew the answer.
questions.answerZh: 要是本知道答案就好了。
questions.highlight: If only Ben knew the answer.

questions.prompt: We wish our kitchen were larger.
questions.promptZh: 我們希望家中的廚房大一點。
questions.answer: If only we had a larger kitchen.
questions.answerZh: 要是我們有一個較大的廚房就好了。
questions.highlight: If only we had a larger kitchen.

questions.prompt: Unfortunately, the bus does not come often enough, and I wish it came more often.
questions.promptZh: 可惜這班巴士的班次不夠頻密，我希望它多來幾班。
questions.answer: If only the bus came more often.
questions.answerZh: 要是這班巴士的班次更頻密就好了。
questions.highlight: If only the bus came more often.

questions.prompt: Daniel wishes he spoke more slowly.
questions.promptZh: 丹尼爾希望自己說慢一點。
questions.answer: If only Daniel spoke more slowly.
questions.answerZh: 要是丹尼爾說慢一點就好了。
questions.highlight: If only Daniel spoke more slowly.

questions.prompt: I wish my phone worked properly.
questions.promptZh: 我希望自己的電話能正常運作。
questions.answer: If only my phone worked properly.
questions.answerZh: 要是我的電話能正常運作就好了。
questions.highlight: If only my phone worked properly.

questions.prompt: I wish the shop were still open, but it has already closed.
questions.promptZh: 我希望商店仍然營業，但它已經關門了。
questions.answer: If only the shop were still open.
questions.answerZh: 要是商店仍然營業就好了。
questions.highlight: If only the shop were still open.

questions.prompt: They do not have enough chairs for everyone, which is a pity.
questions.promptZh: 他們沒有足夠的椅子給所有人使用，實在可惜。
questions.answer: If only they had enough chairs for everyone.
questions.answerZh: 要是他們有足夠的椅子給所有人使用就好了。
questions.highlight: If only they had enough chairs for everyone.

questions.prompt: What does Lily wish she could do? She wishes she could play the piano.
questions.promptZh: 莉莉希望自己能做甚麼？她希望自己會彈鋼琴。
questions.answer: If only Lily could play the piano.
questions.answerZh: 要是莉莉會彈鋼琴就好了。
questions.highlight: If only Lily could play the piano.

questions.prompt: Chloe wishes she could stay for dinner, but she cannot.
questions.promptZh: 克洛伊希望能留下來吃晚飯，但她不能留下。
questions.answer: If only Chloe could stay for dinner.
questions.answerZh: 要是克洛伊能留下來吃晚飯就好了。
questions.highlight: If only Chloe could stay for dinner.

questions.prompt: We wish we could see the stage more clearly.
questions.promptZh: 我們希望能更清楚地看到舞台。
questions.answer: If only we could see the stage more clearly.
questions.answerZh: 要是我們能更清楚地看到舞台就好了。
questions.highlight: If only we could see the stage more clearly.

questions.prompt: I wish the baby would stop crying.
questions.promptZh: 我希望嬰兒不要再哭了。
questions.answer: If only the baby would stop crying.
questions.answerZh: 要是嬰兒能停止哭泣就好了。
questions.highlight: If only the baby would stop crying.

questions.prompt: We wish the neighbours would turn the music down.
questions.promptZh: 我們希望鄰居把音樂聲量調低。
questions.answer: If only the neighbours would turn the music down.
questions.answerZh: 要是鄰居肯把音樂聲量調低就好了。
questions.highlight: If only the neighbours would turn the music down.

questions.prompt: I would buy that coat if it were cheaper, but unfortunately it is too expensive.
questions.promptZh: 如果那件外套便宜一點，我便會買下它，但可惜它實在太貴。
questions.answer: I would buy that coat if only it were cheaper.
questions.answerZh: 要是那件外套便宜一點就好了，我便會買下它。
questions.highlight: I would buy that coat if only it were cheaper.

questions.prompt: Ethan wishes he were free this afternoon because then he could join us.
questions.promptZh: 伊森希望自己今天下午有空，因為這樣他便可以加入我們。
questions.answer: Ethan could join us if only he were free this afternoon.
questions.answerZh: 要是伊森今天下午有空就好了，他便可以加入我們。
questions.highlight: Ethan could join us if only he were free this afternoon.

questions.prompt: We could finish earlier if the printer worked faster, but unfortunately it is very slow.
questions.promptZh: 如果打印機運作快一點，我們便可以早些完成，但可惜它非常慢。
questions.answer: We could finish earlier if only the printer worked faster.
questions.answerZh: 要是打印機運作快一點就好了，我們便可以早些完成。
questions.highlight: We could finish earlier if only the printer worked faster.

questions.prompt: The garden would look better if it got more sunlight, but unfortunately it does not get much.
questions.promptZh: 如果花園得到更多陽光，便會更美觀，但可惜它得到的陽光不多。
questions.answer: The garden would look better if only it got more sunlight.
questions.answerZh: 要是花園得到更多陽光就好了，它便會更美觀。
questions.highlight: The garden would look better if only it got more sunlight.

questions.prompt: Ava wishes she knew someone there because then she would feel less nervous.
questions.promptZh: 艾娃希望自己在那裏認識一些人，因為這樣她便不會那麼緊張。
questions.answer: Ava would feel less nervous if only she knew someone there.
questions.answerZh: 要是艾娃在那裏認識一些人就好了，她便不會那麼緊張。
questions.highlight: Ava would feel less nervous if only she knew someone there.

questions.prompt: I am sorry that I did not bring an umbrella.
questions.promptZh: 我很後悔沒有帶雨傘。
questions.answer: If only I had brought an umbrella.
questions.answerZh: 要是我帶了雨傘就好了。
questions.highlight: If only I had brought an umbrella.

questions.prompt: What does Leo regret? He regrets not checking the timetable.
questions.promptZh: 里奧後悔甚麼？他後悔沒有查看時間表。
questions.answer: If only Leo had checked the timetable.
questions.answerZh: 要是里奧查看過時間表就好了。
questions.highlight: If only Leo had checked the timetable.

questions.prompt: We wish we had booked the tickets earlier.
questions.promptZh: 我們希望自己早一點訂票。
questions.answer: If only we had booked the tickets earlier.
questions.answerZh: 要是我們早一點訂票就好了。
questions.highlight: If only we had booked the tickets earlier.

questions.prompt: Sarah deeply regrets forgetting to save the document.
questions.promptZh: 莎拉非常後悔忘記儲存文件。
questions.answer: If only Sarah had saved the document.
questions.answerZh: 要是莎拉儲存了文件就好了。
questions.highlight: If only Sarah had saved the document.

questions.prompt: The driver wishes he had seen the sign.
questions.promptZh: 司機希望自己當時看見了標誌。
questions.answer: If only the driver had seen the sign.
questions.answerZh: 要是司機當時看見標誌就好了。
questions.highlight: If only the driver had seen the sign.

questions.prompt: I missed the meeting because I did not set an alarm. I regret that mistake.
questions.promptZh: 我因為沒有設定鬧鐘而錯過會議。我很後悔這個錯誤。
questions.answer: I would not have missed the meeting if only I had set an alarm.
questions.answerZh: 要是我設定了鬧鐘就好了，我便不會錯過會議。
questions.highlight: I would not have missed the meeting if only I had set an alarm.

questions.prompt: Nina added too much sugar, so the cake did not taste very good.
questions.promptZh: 妮娜加了太多糖，所以蛋糕不太好吃。
questions.answer: The cake would have tasted better if only Nina had added less sugar.
questions.answerZh: 要是妮娜少加一點糖就好了，蛋糕便會更好吃。
questions.highlight: The cake would have tasted better if only Nina had added less sugar.

questions.prompt: We regret not asking for directions because we found the hotel much later than expected.
questions.promptZh: 我們很後悔沒有問路，因為我們比預期遲了很多才找到酒店。
questions.answer: We could have found the hotel sooner if only we had asked for directions.
questions.answerZh: 要是我們問過路就好了，我們便可以更早找到酒店。
questions.highlight: We could have found the hotel sooner if only we had asked for directions.

questions.prompt: The team regrets not defending more carefully because they might have won the match.
questions.promptZh: 球隊後悔沒有更小心防守，因為他們原本可能勝出比賽。
questions.answer: The team might have won if only they had defended more carefully.
questions.answerZh: 要是球隊防守得更小心就好了，他們可能便會勝出。
questions.highlight: The team might have won if only they had defended more carefully.

questions.prompt: No one watered the plants, so they died. It is a great pity.
questions.promptZh: 沒有人為植物澆水，所以它們枯死了，實在非常可惜。
questions.answer: The plants would not have died if only someone had watered them.
questions.answerZh: 要是有人為植物澆水就好了，它們便不會枯死。
questions.highlight: The plants would not have died if only someone had watered them.

questions.prompt: I wish my brother were more patient.
questions.promptZh: 我希望我的哥哥更有耐性。
questions.answer: If only my brother were more patient.
questions.answerZh: 要是我的哥哥更有耐性就好了。
questions.highlight: If only my brother were more patient.

questions.prompt: I really wish I could remember her name.
questions.promptZh: 我真的希望自己能記起她的名字。
questions.answer: If only I could remember her name.
questions.answerZh: 要是我能記起她的名字就好了。
questions.highlight: If only I could remember her name.

questions.prompt: What does everyone wish after a morning of heavy rain? They wish the rain would stop.
questions.promptZh: 下了一個早上的大雨後，大家有甚麼願望？他們希望雨停下來。
questions.answer: If only the rain would stop.
questions.answerZh: 要是雨能停下來就好了。
questions.highlight: If only the rain would stop.

questions.prompt: Olivia would travel more often if she had more annual leave, but unfortunately she does not.
questions.promptZh: 如果奧莉花有更多年假，她便會更常去旅行，但可惜她沒有。
questions.answer: Olivia would travel more often if only she had more annual leave.
questions.answerZh: 要是奧莉花有更多年假就好了，她便會更常去旅行。
questions.highlight: Olivia would travel more often if only she had more annual leave.

questions.prompt: The children could play outside if the air were cleaner, but unfortunately it is not clean enough.
questions.promptZh: 如果空氣更清新，孩子們便可以在戶外玩耍，但可惜現在的空氣不夠清新。
questions.answer: The children could play outside if only the air were cleaner.
questions.answerZh: 要是空氣更清新就好了，孩子們便可以在戶外玩耍。
questions.highlight: The children could play outside if only the air were cleaner.

questions.prompt: I now regret ignoring my teacher's advice.
questions.promptZh: 我現在很後悔沒有聽從老師的建議。
questions.answer: If only I had listened to my teacher's advice.
questions.answerZh: 要是我當時聽從了老師的建議就好了。
questions.highlight: If only I had listened to my teacher's advice.

questions.prompt: Marcus wishes he had not deleted the email by mistake.
questions.promptZh: 馬庫斯希望自己沒有錯誤刪除那封電郵。
questions.answer: If only Marcus had not deleted the email.
questions.answerZh: 要是馬庫斯沒有刪除那封電郵就好了。
questions.highlight: If only Marcus had not deleted the email.

questions.prompt: It is a pity that the queue moved so slowly; we would otherwise have caught the last train.
questions.promptZh: 可惜隊伍前進得太慢，否則我們便能趕上尾班車。
questions.answer: We would have caught the last train if only the queue had moved faster.
questions.answerZh: 要是隊伍前進得快一點就好了，我們便能趕上尾班車。
questions.highlight: We would have caught the last train if only the queue had moved faster.

questions.prompt: The customer would be happier if the company replied sooner, but unfortunately it has not replied yet.
questions.promptZh: 如果公司早些回覆，顧客會更滿意，但可惜公司仍未回覆。
questions.answer: The customer would be happier if only the company replied sooner.
questions.answerZh: 要是公司早些回覆就好了，顧客便會更滿意。
questions.highlight: The customer would be happier if only the company replied sooner.

questions.prompt: I wish this laptop were not so heavy.
questions.promptZh: 我希望這部手提電腦沒有那麼重。
questions.answer: If only this laptop were not so heavy.
questions.answerZh: 要是這部手提電腦沒有那麼重就好了。
questions.highlight: If only this laptop were not so heavy.

questions.prompt: It is unfortunate that the school does not have a quieter place where students can study.
questions.promptZh: 可惜學校沒有一個更安靜的地方讓學生溫習。
questions.answer: If only the school had a quieter place where students could study.
questions.answerZh: 要是學校有一個更安靜的地方讓學生溫習就好了。
questions.highlight: If only the school had a quieter place where students could study.

questions.prompt: The hospital could reduce waiting times if it had more staff at night, but unfortunately it does not.
questions.promptZh: 如果醫院晚間有更多人手，便可以縮短輪候時間，但可惜目前人手不足。
questions.answer: The hospital could reduce waiting times if only it had more staff at night.
questions.answerZh: 要是醫院晚間有更多人手就好了，便可以縮短輪候時間。
questions.highlight: The hospital could reduce waiting times if only it had more staff at night.

questions.prompt: What do I regret about the call? I regret not explaining the problem clearly enough.
questions.promptZh: 我對那次通話有甚麼後悔？我後悔沒有把問題解釋得足夠清楚。
questions.answer: If only I had explained the problem more clearly during the call.
questions.answerZh: 要是我在通話期間把問題解釋得更清楚就好了。
questions.highlight: If only I had explained the problem more clearly during the call.

questions.prompt: Unfortunately, the supplier delivered the parts late, so the project fell behind schedule.
questions.promptZh: 可惜供應商延遲交付零件，所以項目進度落後。
questions.answer: The project would have stayed on schedule if only the supplier had delivered the parts on time.
questions.answerZh: 要是供應商準時交付零件就好了，項目便能維持原定進度。
questions.highlight: The project would have stayed on schedule if only the supplier had delivered the parts on time.

questions.prompt: Many passengers wish public transport were more reliable during bad weather.
questions.promptZh: 很多乘客都希望公共交通在惡劣天氣下更可靠。
questions.answer: If only public transport were more reliable during bad weather.
questions.answerZh: 要是公共交通在惡劣天氣下更可靠就好了。
questions.highlight: If only public transport were more reliable during bad weather.

questions.prompt: Grace wishes the office were not so noisy because then she could concentrate better.
questions.promptZh: 格蕾絲希望辦公室沒有那麼嘈吵，因為這樣她便可以更集中精神。
questions.answer: Grace could concentrate better if only the office were not so noisy.
questions.answerZh: 要是辦公室沒有那麼嘈吵就好了，格蕾絲便可以更集中精神。
questions.highlight: Grace could concentrate better if only the office were not so noisy.

questions.prompt: What do residents wish the council would do? They wish it would repair the broken street lights.
questions.promptZh: 居民希望市政當局做甚麼？他們希望當局維修損壞的街燈。
questions.answer: If only the council would repair the broken street lights.
questions.answerZh: 要是市政當局肯維修損壞的街燈就好了。
questions.highlight: If only the council would repair the broken street lights.

questions.prompt: We regret that both sides did not check the details; doing so might have prevented the misunderstanding.
questions.promptZh: 我們後悔雙方都沒有核對細節；核對細節或許能避免這場誤會。
questions.answer: We might have avoided the misunderstanding if only both sides had checked the details.
questions.answerZh: 要是雙方都核對過細節就好了，我們或許便能避免這場誤會。
questions.highlight: We might have avoided the misunderstanding if only both sides had checked the details.

questions.prompt: We regret not including clearer examples because the presentation would have been more convincing.
questions.promptZh: 我們後悔沒有加入更清晰的例子，因為這樣簡報會更具說服力。
questions.answer: The presentation would have been more convincing if only we had included clearer examples.
questions.answerZh: 要是我們加入了更清晰的例子就好了，簡報便會更具說服力。
questions.highlight: The presentation would have been more convincing if only we had included clearer examples.

questions.prompt: I deeply regret not realising earlier how much the decision would affect the whole team.
questions.promptZh: 我非常後悔沒有早一點明白這個決定會對整個團隊造成多大影響。
questions.answer: If only I had realised earlier how much the decision would affect the whole team.
questions.answerZh: 要是我早一點明白這個決定會對整個團隊造成多大影響就好了。
questions.highlight: If only I had realised earlier how much the decision would affect the whole team.
